entities.name: TRICHODERMA HAMATUM
entities.description: Endophytic fungus UoM 13 used to induce protection and suppress disease in pearl millet

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The host crop evaluated for resistance against downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The fungal disease/pathogen affecting pearl millet

entities.name: SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of T. hamatum to seeds to enhance growth and immunity

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of seed sprouting, enhanced by T. hamatum treatment

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOR
entities.description: The health and robustness of seedlings, enhanced by T. hamatum treatment

entities.name: SYSTEMIC IMMUNITY
entities.description: Durable and widespread resistance induced in the plant against pathogens

entities.name: LIGNIFICATION
entities.description: Defense response involving the deposition of lignin in cell walls

entities.name: CALLOSE DEPOSITION
entities.description: Defense response involving the accumulation of callose at infection sites

entities.name: GLUCANASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity is enhanced by T. hamatum

entities.name: PEROXIDASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity is enhanced by T. hamatum

entities.name: PHENYLALANINE AMMONIA-LYASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity is enhanced by T. hamatum

entities.name: POLYPHENOL OXIDASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose activity is enhanced by T. hamatum

entities.name: RT-PCR ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to analyze the expression of defense enzymes and PR-proteins

entities.name: PR-PROTEINS
entities.description: Pathogenesis-related proteins involved in the plant's defense response

entities.name: PR-1
entities.description: A specific pathogenesis-related protein gene overexpressed in treated seedlings

entities.name: PR-5
entities.description: A specific pathogenesis-related protein gene overexpressed in treated seedlings

entities.name: HRGPS
entities.description: Hydroxyproline-rich glycoproteins involved in cell wall defense

entities.name: SALICYLIC ACID
entities.description: An endogenous signaling molecule stimulated by T. hamatum to induce resistance

entities.name: ISOCHORISMATE SYNTHASE
entities.description: A gene involved in the biosynthesis of salicylic acid, upregulated by T. hamatum

entities.name: SA BIOSYNTHETIC PATHWAY
entities.description: The metabolic pathway for salicylic acid production involved in mounting systemic immunity
